query:
-- Matches mit ungültigen player1_id oder player3_id
SELECT m.id, m.type, m.player1_id, m.player3_id
FROM matches m
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM players p WHERE p.id = m.player1_id)
   OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM players p WHERE p.id = m.player3_id);
